label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz attacked inside final kilometer on lumpy finish, dropped Pedersen who followed his wheel, stayed in red
tactical_patterns: Roglic contested mountain points mid-stage to deny Alaphilippe, revealing willingness to spend energy early on lumpy stages.
Pedersen followed Elissonde's leadout then Roglic's attack, showing he'll track GC riders over pure sprinters on selective terrain.
Bennett's slow puncture forced mechanical change too far back for regrouping, exposing green jersey vulnerability on aggressive days.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: attacking inside 1km on lumpy finish while already in red suggests superior form to previous Vuelta editions
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: second place and intermediate sprint points gain despite following GC rider's acceleration shows climbing progression
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: mechanical at critical moment plus inability to contest reduced sprint points indicates fragile green jersey control
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: chasing mountain points suggests targeting KOM but blocked by Roglic's territorial defense
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: third place despite battling Vlasov indicates decent but not exceptional punch on short climbs
